---
title: "Black Giles, the Poacher, with some Account of a Family who had rather live by their Wits than their Work"
---

## Black Giles, the Poacher, with some Account of a Family who had rather live by their Wits than their Work

**Author:** Hannah More
**Date:** 1796
**Imprint:** London: Marshall

### Notes

One of the Cheap Repository Tracts

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
